summary: Comprehensive helm-unittest test suite covering all 15 Helm chart templates with 304 tests across 17 suites. Every template has a dedicated test file, all 8 values.yaml toggles are tested in both states, integration tests validate cross-template consistency (resource counts, fullnameOverride propagation, serviceAccount.name propagation, webhook cross-references), and reference documentation is complete. All tests pass with 0 failures. Two issues require changes: the integration test omits crd-template.yaml from its template list (violating the 'ALL templates' plan requirement), and 7 NOTES.txt test cases are duplicated across helpers_test.yaml and chart_metadata_test.yaml.

tests_checklist.item: Every template file has a dedicated test file
All 8 values.yaml toggles tested for both true and false states
Toggle combinations tested (webhook+certmanager dual gate, rbac+leaderElection dual gate)
RBAC tests validate exact rule counts (11, 3, 2+1) and verb sets
Integration test renders ALL templates simultaneously
Integration test validates cross-template fullnameOverride propagation
Integration test validates webhook cross-references with fullnameOverride
Consistent release metadata (test-release, test-ns) across all files

code_quality_checklist.item: Test files use consistent suite/templates/release/tests structure
Assertions are specific (exact values, not just existence checks)
No dead code or commented-out tests
No duplicated test logic across files

security_checklist.item: N/A - YAML test files have no security surface

architecture_checklist.item: One test file per template (clear 1:1 mapping)
Integration test separated from unit tests
Helper functions tested via proxy templates (acceptable pattern)
Solution is as simple as possible for helm-unittest

dry_yagni_checklist.item: No unnecessary abstractions in test files
No duplicated NOTES.txt test cases across files

defensive_checklist.item: N/A - no external inputs in test files

issues_found.description: Integration test templates: block omits templates/crd-template.yaml. Plan Task 2.1 explicitly requires 'rendering ALL templates simultaneously' but the CRD template is excluded. The crds.managedByHelm toggle has no integration-level coverage. The documented '15 resources' count is correct only because the CRD defaults to 0 documents, but the template is not even loaded so a regression where it always renders would not be caught.
issues_found.fix: Add '- templates/crd-template.yaml' to the templates list at line 15. Add 'hasDocuments: count: 0' with 'template: templates/crd-template.yaml' to the default resource count test. Add a new test: 'should produce 1 CRD when crds.managedByHelm is true' with set crds.managedByHelm=true asserting hasDocuments count: 1 for that template.

issues_found.description: 7 NOTES.txt test cases in helpers_test.yaml Suite 2 (lines 131-173) are semantic duplicates of tests in chart_metadata_test.yaml (lines 63-98). Both target templates/NOTES.txt and assert identical patterns: Webhooks enabled/disabled, cert-manager enabled, cert-manager warning, ServiceMonitor enabled/disabled, and default fullname. Any NOTES.txt change requires updating assertions in two files.
issues_found.fix: Remove lines 127-173 from helpers_test.yaml (the duplicated NOTES.txt component status tests). Keep the fullname/truncation/selectorLabelsKubectl tests (lines 88-125) in helpers_test.yaml Suite 2 since those test _helpers.tpl functions not covered elsewhere. All component status tests belong in chart_metadata_test.yaml.

issues_found.description: Documentation states deployment_test.yaml has '54 tests' but actual count is 56 (verified via grep -c '  - it:').
issues_found.fix: Change '54 tests' to '56 tests' on line 69.

issues_found.description: Both files assert on app.kubernetes.io/version label (crd_template_test.yaml:53, helpers_test.yaml:57) without declaring a chart: block to pin appVersion. 9 other test files include chart: { appVersion: '0.1.0', version: '0.1.0' }. These assertions depend on the live Chart.yaml appVersion and will break silently if it changes.
issues_found.fix: Add 'chart: { appVersion: "0.1.0", version: "0.1.0" }' after the release: block in both files, matching the pattern in deployment_test.yaml and 8 other test files.

issues_found.description: ClusterRole rules prose lists 'memcacheds, deployments, services, PDBs, networkpolicies, servicemonitors, HPAs, secrets, events' (9 items) but claims 11 rules. The 2 missing items are memcacheds/status and memcacheds/finalizers sub-resources.
issues_found.fix: Change to: '11 rules covering memcacheds (including /status and /finalizers sub-resources), deployments, services, PDBs, networkpolicies, servicemonitors, HPAs, secrets, events'

suggested_improvements: Consider adding a fullnameOverride propagation test for NetworkPolicy in integration_test.yaml (was added in this diff, good catch)

The helpers_test.yaml Suite 2 fullname/truncation tests (lines 88-125) could optionally be moved to chart_metadata_test.yaml for a single NOTES.txt test file, but keeping them separate for the _helpers.tpl focus is also reasonable
next_steps: Add templates/crd-template.yaml to integration_test.yaml templates list with default count: 0 and managedByHelm=true count: 1 assertions
Remove 7 duplicated NOTES.txt component status tests from helpers_test.yaml lines 127-173
Add chart: block to crd_template_test.yaml and helpers_test.yaml Suite 1
Fix deployment test count in docs (54 → 56)
Fix ClusterRole rules prose in docs to mention /status and /finalizers sub-resources
Run helm unittest to confirm 0 failures after changes

metadata.title: N004: Add Helm unittest suite for all templates
